name: codex-plugin
description: Agentic development toolkit for Codex with skills, expert personas, and hooks.

interface.shortDescription: A broad Codex toolkit for agentic engineering workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex Plugin migrates Everything Antigravity into a Codex-native plugin package with reusable skills, expert persona prompts, lifecycle hooks, and development utilities.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Plugin to review my current changes.
Use Codex Plugin to plan an implementation.
Use Codex Plugin to pick useful skills for this repo.
